scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:js && npm run build:types
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:run
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && npm run test:run -- --experimental-test-coverage '--test-coverage-include=src/**/*.ts' --test-coverage-lines=100 --test-coverage-branches=100 --test-coverage-functions=100
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run pack:dry-run
